questions: Someone at a public park tells you that you can't sit on this particular bench because they've been using it every day for years. What do you do?
Your neighbor says you need to mow your lawn by Sunday because they're hosting a party. You have no HOA agreement. How do you respond?
A coworker with no authority over you tells you to rewrite your email before sending it because they don't like the tone. What do you do?
A fellow passenger on a bus loudly announces that everyone should give up their window seats so his group can sit together. What do you do?
A friend insists you need to switch phone brands because theirs is better. You're happy with your current phone. What do you say?
